load_root_cause_hypotheses_asset_v1 is decorated with @lru_cache(maxsize=64) at line 66. In test environments, cache may persist across test cases if tests modify YAML files mid-run. Cursor should be aware test isolation may require pytest cache-clearing if needed.

signal_vitamin_d_low activates when vitamin_d is below range (enable_lower_bound: true). Evidence rules in the hypothesis YAML should use direction: 'low' for vitamin_d marker checks. signal_total_cholesterol_high activates when total_cholesterol is above range; use direction: 'high'.

The KB-S60 signal library for signal_total_cholesterol_high references tc_hdl_ratio as a supporting metric (signal_library.yaml lines 17-25). If hypothesis evidence rules reference tc_hdl_ratio, the marker must be available in biomarker_context for evidence to fire — may be missing in minimal test fixtures.

Regression test pattern: test_root_cause_v1_homocysteine.py uses run_golden_panel with fixture files and _finding_by_signal helper. Cursor should follow this pattern for new regression tests, with fixtures that activate the target signal (total_cholesterol above range for Group A; vitamin_d below range for Group B).
